# sweb_ptr_record (Resource)

Manages the reverse-DNS (PTR) record of a public IP (getPtr/editPtr on /vps/ip). The IP must already belong to the account. Destroying the resource resets the PTR to the provider default.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manage the reverse-DNS (PTR) record of a public IP the account already owns.
# Destroying the resource resets the PTR to the provider default.
resource "sweb_ptr_record" "mail" {
  ip  = "203.0.113.7" # from `sweb vps ip list <vps>`
  ptr = "mail.example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The public IP whose PTR record is managed. Changing it targets a different IP.
- `ptr` (String) The reverse-DNS name to set for the IP.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource id (equals ip).
